response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience spanning frontend, backend, and infrastructure. Core stack alignment is strong (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK) and recent work at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. A demonstrated testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are secondary: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Python experience, though adjacent skills suggest a fast ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work in recent roles
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current position, matching a rare JD requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD practice, authored test libraries, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, though the primary stack names both
Kotlin and Python absent from skills; Java experience appears dated (robotics work 2016-2018)
Significant investment in niche DLang ecosystem may indicate ramp-up time on JVM-side services

key_factors.factor: Depth and recency of TypeScript/Node/React fullstack work
AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js/Vitest/Kotlin from primary and secondary stack
